tasks.title: Scaffold the source flake baseline
acceptance_criteria: The source repository has a working flake.
Formatting and pre-commit checks are wired through Nix.
nix flake check succeeds on the source repository.
notes: This was completed before template export work began.

tasks.title: Dogfood the instantiated-repo control plane in the source repo
acceptance_criteria: The repo contains the canonical docs required by the current design.
TASKS.json validates against a real schema.
nix flake check validates the control plane and basic repo integrity.
notes: This task intentionally dogfoods the generated-repo model in-source.

tasks.title: Export the first default template after the dogfood pass
acceptance_criteria: nix flake init -t .#default produces a coherent starter repo.
The exported template reflects the dogfooded repo structure rather than an invented one.
notes: This remains blocked on the dogfood pass feeling credible.
